ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current status of the order */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date and time the order was added */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last modified */,
  "action" TEXT /* Last action taken on the order (e.g., View, Edit, Cancel) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address of the customer */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billing address of the customer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to pay for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method used to ship the order */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping the order */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the order */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the order */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES order_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_action FOREIGN KEY ("action") REFERENCES order_actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer's billing address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer's billing address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer's billing address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer's billing address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the customer's last login */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Segment the customer belongs to */,
  "customer_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency of the customer */,
  "marketing_preferences" TEXT /* Preferences for marketing communications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the order status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the status is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the order action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order action */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the action is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the action was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the action was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "item_price" TEXT /* Price of the product per unit */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the product */,
  "final_price" TEXT /* Final price of the product after discount */,
  "item_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the item */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the item */,
  "item_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the item */,
  "item_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date and time the stock was last updated */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the supplier is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the supplier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the supplier was last updated */,
  "supplier_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the supplier */,
  "supplier_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer the address belongs to */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of the address (e.g., Billing, Shipping) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address line */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the address is the default */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Customer Service, Finance) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the action was taken on */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the action taken */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who took the action */,
  "action_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES order_actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
